recent_projects.name: pypz-rmq-io
recent_projects.summary: Provides an AMQP implementation for RabbitMQ of the ChannelInput/OutputPort in pypz.

recent_projects.name: pypz-kafka-io
recent_projects.summary: Provides a Kafka implementation of the ChannelInput/OutputPort in pypz.

recent_projects.name: pypz-io-sniffer
recent_projects.summary: A small tool that is capable to sniff and visualize the control messages between Operators.

recent_projects.name: pypz-core
recent_projects.summary: Core components of pypz (pipes), which is a lightweight Pipeline as Code (PaC) framework.

recent_projects.name: pypz-k8s-deployer
recent_projects.summary: This package provides the Kubernetes implementation of the deployer interface for pypz.

recent_no_vcs_projects.name: pypz-rmq-io
recent_no_vcs_projects.summary: Provides an AMQP implementation for RabbitMQ of the ChannelInput/OutputPort in pypz.

recent_no_vcs_projects.name: pypz-kafka-io
recent_no_vcs_projects.summary: Provides a Kafka implementation of the ChannelInput/OutputPort in pypz.

recent_no_vcs_projects.name: pypz-io-sniffer
recent_no_vcs_projects.summary: A small tool that is capable to sniff and visualize the control messages between Operators.

recent_no_vcs_projects.name: pypz-core
recent_no_vcs_projects.summary: Core components of pypz (pipes), which is a lightweight Pipeline as Code (PaC) framework.

recent_no_vcs_projects.name: pypz-k8s-deployer
recent_no_vcs_projects.summary: This package provides the Kubernetes implementation of the deployer interface for pypz.
